$comment: Per-series harvest lists for the Harvest tab. One entry per weekend; the app resolves the weekend by dinner date. Checkbox state lives in the per-dinner Firestore doc (state.harvest). DRAFT 2026-06-22: menu-derived first pass for the July build-out. Quantities are estimates pending the R&D pass with Chris and the cover reconcile vs Tim's xlsx; confirm all with Kelly before printing her checklist.

weekends.label: July 11-12
weekends.intro: DRAFT pick list, quantities pending R&D + cover reconcile. Pick fresh each morning. Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.name: Squash blossoms
items.note: stuffed-blossom bite · pick morning-of, they wilt fast · count covers the bite plus breakage; a few extra if pasta garnish runs

items.name: Sweet peppers
items.note: marinated for the pepper toast bite + charred in Course 1

items.name: Eggplant
items.note: Course 1 char

items.name: Summer squash
items.note: Course 1 char

items.name: Cabbage
items.note: Course 1 char

items.name: Onions
items.note: Course 1 char

items.name: Walla Walla onions
items.note: Course 3 contorni · coal-roasted whole, shared family-style

items.name: Kale
items.note: Course 3 contorni · grilled

items.name: Green garlic
items.note: the crust on the beef · replaces the spring scapes (gone by our dates)

items.name: Tomato leaves
items.qty: a couple of handfuls for the weekend
items.note: tomato-leaf oil for Course 1 · the one farm 'tomato' in July

items.name: Lemon verbena
items.note: dessert garnish · plus a bunch sent to SF ahead for the panna cotta steep

items.name: Lavender
items.note: infuses the honey for the pepper toast (honey itself is bought, Kelly is out)

items.name: Edible flowers
items.note: pasta lamination, dessert scatter, bite garnish · lavender, rose, nasturtium, calendula

items.name: Tender herbs (herb wall)
items.note: thyme for the blossom bite + beef, mint for the pepper toast, herbs for Course 1 and the beef crust, soft herbs for the pasta lamination

confirm.name: Guanciale (Tim)
confirm.note: PENDING count · may be short for two dinners · if short, the blossom filling leans goat cheese with guanciale as accent

confirm.name: Beef cut (Tim)
confirm.note: PENDING · cut + freezer weights TBD (rib roast vs strip loin) · confirm the new steer landed before 7/11 · lamb loin chop is the fallback

confirm.name: Chicken + duck eggs
confirm.note: already sent to SF ahead for the pasta dough and the cured-yolk cure (started end of June) · just confirm the count held

weekends.footnote: DRAFT pending Kelly's confirm. Stracciatella, ricotta, goat cheese, parmesan, cultured butter, and stone fruit (Rainier cherries this weekend) come from SF / Franks. SF make-aheads (preserved lemon, cured egg yolk, panna cotta bases, laminated sheets, blossom filling) are built at the restaurant, not picked here.
